email_subject: Application for Store Assistant / Sales Associate – Christmas Shop
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Store Assistant / Sales Associate position at the Christmas Shop in Bruges, as advertised via Actief Interim. With a strong customer service orientation and experience in fast-paced environments, I am confident I can contribute to creating a warm and festive shopping experience.

In my current role as a Junior Digital Marketer, I have honed my communication and organizational skills, while my previous position in warehouse logistics at Katoen Natie taught me to work efficiently under pressure. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I enjoy interacting with people from diverse backgrounds and am eager to help customers find the perfect Christmas decorations.

I am available to start in September and can work weekends on a rotating schedule. I would love to bring my enthusiasm and reliability to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Store Assistant / Sales Associate position at the Christmas Shop in Bruges. The opportunity to work in a festive, customer-focused environment and help visitors create magical Christmas memories is exactly the kind of role I thrive in.

While my professional background is in digital marketing and web development, I have always enjoyed roles that involve direct customer interaction and teamwork. In my current position as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple projects, communicate with clients, and ensure that every detail is handled with care. Previously, I worked as a Warehouse & Logistics associate at Katoen Natie, where I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume setting. These experiences have equipped me with strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to stay calm under pressure.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am currently learning Dutch (A2 level). I enjoy working with people from different cultures and am comfortable communicating in a multilingual environment. I am also willing to work weekends on a rotating schedule.

I am passionate about providing excellent service and creating a welcoming atmosphere. I would be delighted to bring my enthusiasm, reliability, and team spirit to your Christmas store in the heart of Bruges.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of contributing to your team.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch A2 (in progress) – ideal for international customers
Customer-focused with experience in high-volume, fast-paced environments (Katoen Natie warehouse)
Strong communication and organizational skills from digital marketing and client management
Willing to work weekends on a rotating schedule
Enthusiastic, reliable, and eager to provide excellent service in a festive retail setting
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, now seeking a customer-facing retail role. I enjoy helping people and creating a warm, welcoming atmosphere. At Episto, I manage client relationships and projects with attention to detail. Previously, I worked in warehouse logistics at Katoen Natie, where I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a fast-paced environment. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively learning Dutch (A2). I am enthusiastic, reliable, and eager to provide excellent service in a festive Christmas shop.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: welcoming and assisting customers, advising on products, providing a pleasant shopping experience
- Multilingual: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Retail & logistics: restocking, maintaining store presentation, handling payments, processing deliveries
- Teamwork & reliability: experience working in fast-paced environments, willing to work weekends
- Digital & organizational: content management, social media coordination, performance reporting

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client websites and content, ensuring timely updates and clear communication
- Write and publish keyword-targeted content, demonstrating attention to detail and customer focus
- Track performance metrics and report results, showing analytical and organizational skills

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Worked as part of a team to meet daily targets and ensure smooth operations

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver user-friendly interfaces

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, managing content and social media integration
- Implemented structured data and technical audits to improve visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
